section.div: Configure this plugin with repositories you want to feature!

The complete KiCad development environment for VS Code: open schematics and PCBs, run DRC/ERC, export production files, inspect BOMs, search components, compare design revisions, and optionally get AI-powered design guidance.
I2C slave protocol to answer to multiple addresses for the RP2040
The official firmware for Meshtastic, an open-source, off-grid mesh communication system.
